name: Chutney Peanut Butter Canapes
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Major Grey's chutney, finely chopped
Toasted rye bread slices - crusts removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend well the peanut butter, cream cheese, salt, wine, and chutney.
2. Spread the mixture onto toasted rye bread slices (crusts removed).
3. Cut into individual triangles or fingers.
4. Makes 2 cups of spread.
